name: @cinatra-ai/context-selection-agent
description: Core context-agent extension. Non-uninstallable A2A sub-agent that a calling context-using agent invokes for contextSlot resolution. Owns: resolver invocation, ContextSelector HITL renderer (interactive mode), version pinning at selection time, run_context_selections audit write, output_data.contextRefs to the calling agent. Invoked explicitly per slot via an author-added context-agent FlowNode + an @cinatra-ai/context-selection-agent agentDependencies entry on the context-using agent (child-local). NOT runtime auto-wiring; adding a context slot means an OAS change PLUS the explicit FlowNode/dependency wiring.
